rationale: real_next_impl is I/O-driven: HostState::next_ensures invokes Self::next, which existentially quantifies over both the host step discriminator and the entire ios trace, so two runs from the same pre-state can soundly yield different (post_self, post_netc, rc) tuples that both satisfy next_ensures. The determinism postcondition is therefore not valid, and no sound prelude or functional-uniqueness lemma can discharge it without an unsound assume/axiom; the asserts kept above are provable consequences of next_requires and exist only to keep the prelude lex-clean.
